title: Significant Problem, Public Value, and Durable Need · Cumulative Product Review
summary: A delayed review reconstructs significant problem, public value, and durable need from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for significance and public-value case after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.
Bound affected populations, contexts, frequency, severity, unequal burden, and who is missing from available evidence.
Study current services, manual workarounds, nonuse, competitors, public infrastructure, and build-nothing options.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.

Which action demonstrates Significance Evidence without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. For Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, keep Significance Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Significance Evidence condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

hints: For Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Significance Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.

For Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for significance and public-value case.
Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant. That claim does not survive the significance evidence · changed case evidence boundary.

stimulus.title: Durability Change case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Current demand guarantees a durable need.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon. Artifact under review: significance and public-value case.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Durability Change, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Durability Change
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Durability Change: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Durability Change.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Record what required effort · Review Durability Change, keep Durability Change connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

hints: For Record what required effort · Review Durability Change, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Durability Change precondition, or invariant that must hold.

The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.
For Record what required effort · Review Durability Change, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Current demand guarantees a durable need.
